ddls:
CREATE TABLE "world_cups" (
  "world_cup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each World Cup */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the World Cup was held */,
  "host_country" TEXT /* Country where the World Cup was hosted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the World Cup started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the World Cup ended */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the World Cup */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the World Cup */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Player with the most goals in the World Cup */,
  "best_player" TEXT /* Best player of the World Cup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("world_cup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "world_cup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the World Cup the match was part of */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the tournament (e.g., Group Stage, Round of 16, Quarter-Final) */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament (e.g., Knockout Stage, Final) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match */,
  "man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Man of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_world_cup_id FOREIGN KEY ("world_cup_id") REFERENCES world_cups ("world_cup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "fifa_rank" INTEGER /* FIFA ranking of the team */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the team was assigned to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the result belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team in the match */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team in the match */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the team */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender, Goalkeeper) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "club" TEXT /* Club the player plays for */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "world_cup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the World Cup the player participated in */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists provided by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "penalties_taken" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the player */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the player */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles by the player */,
  "dribbles_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of attempted dribbles by the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles by the player */,
  "tackles_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of attempted tackles by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_world_cup_id FOREIGN KEY ("world_cup_id") REFERENCES world_cups ("world_cup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Golden Ball, Golden Boot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., player, team, coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award received */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "world_cup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the World Cup the award was given for */,
  "award_received_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id", "player_id", "world_cup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the stadium (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the stadium (e.g., length, width) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the referee is from */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-referee assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the referee officiated */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the referee (e.g., Main Referee, Assistant Referee 1, Assistant Referee 2) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the referee's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistics belong to */,
  "world_cup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the World Cup the team participated in */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "penalties_won" INTEGER /* Number of penalties won by the team */,
  "penalties_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of penalties conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_world_cup_id FOREIGN KEY ("world_cup_id") REFERENCES world_cups ("world_cup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the event occurred in */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Goal, Yellow Card, Red Card) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the lineup is for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the lineup */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "substitute" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player was a substitute */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_lineups_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_lineups_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_lineups_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "world_cup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the World Cup the feedback is for */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the fan (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the fan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_feedback_world_cup_id FOREIGN KEY ("world_cup_id") REFERENCES world_cups ("world_cup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media entry */,
  "world_cup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the World Cup the social media metrics are for */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram, Facebook) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the platform */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the platform */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_world_cup_id FOREIGN KEY ("world_cup_id") REFERENCES world_cups ("world_cup_id")
)
